text: Moving from the quiet observation outside a glass-walled meeting room to a bright, stimulating exhibition space, I feel a sense of transition—from the structured, collective focus of a group working together to the solitary contemplation inspired by innovation and research. The colorful wall and bold 'R+D' lettering remind me of the human drive to question, experiment, and understand. I feel curious and invigorated, eager to absorb new knowledge and consider how thought itself is constantly evolving.
